case_title: LYNCH, JAMES VS PACIFIC GAS & ELECTRIC CO.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,700.00 FILED BY LYNCH, JAMES AS TO DEFENDANT PACIFIC GAS & ELECTRIC CO. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-10-1996 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT C
SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM ISSUED TO CUSTODIAN OF RECORDS FOR PG&E
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PACIFIC GAS & ELECTRIC CO.
SUBPENA DUCES TECUM AS TO PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC CO CUSTODIAN OF RECORDS FILED.
COPY OF CORRESPONDENCE TO COMM.KAPLAN FROM JAMES LYNCH FILED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LYNCH, JAMES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PACIFIC GAS & ELECTRIC CO. $1,700.00 PRINCIPAL, $22.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,722.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT PACIFIC GAS & ELECTRIC CO.
